name: Skelton Mast

name: Belmont Mast

name: New Caldbeck Mast

name: Emley Moor Tower
remarks: Tallest freestanding structure in UK. Original 137 m (449 ft) tower built in 1956, replaced 1964. Second 385 m (1,263 ft) guyed tubular mast was built 1964 to replace the tower, but collapsed in 1969 due to icing and strong winds.

name: Durris Mast

name: Arfon Mast

name: Emley Moor Temporary Broadcasting Mast

name: Winter Hill Mast

name: Waltham Mast
remarks: Original mast built in 1966, collapsed before completion later that year. Replaced by a new mast with the same height.

name: The Shard

name: Black Hill Mast
